nodes.name: Kian Portal Inbox
nodes.notes: TESTING: stopWorkflow + neverError:false-equivalent so you SEE the status & body. After confirmed working in production, set onError = continueRegularOutput (non-blocking).

nodes.name: Inspect Response
nodes.notes: Open this node's input to read statusCode + body. Expect 200 and { ok:true, message_inserted:true } on first run, { duplicate:true } on a repeat of the same message_id.
